column1: # This row set was produced by the simulated-annealing search (no
# Feasibility-Jump-style construction phase) on raw MIPLIB instances with a
# 15s/instance time limit. SA without a primal heuristic is not expected to
# find feasible points on most pure-MILP instances; the numbers below are
# Purpose: lock in a self-consistent baseline so post-port ViolationLS can be
# compared apples-to-apples on the same subset (epic #64). Re-run after the
# port to populate the post-port rows.
# Notes on integer-default upper bound: pre-fix
# explicit UP/UI bound were left at +inf and clamped to 1e9
# (read_mps now applies the CPLEX/Gurobi/SCIP ub=1 default)
# should be regenerated; see issue #64 P5 (#70).
